gold.title: Floating Panel
gold.reason: Framer Motion spring-animated floating panel with context-driven open/close state and back-navigation — premium feel perfect for product feature callouts and interactive menus.

gold.title: Animated Popover
gold.reason: Framer Motion popover with AnimatePresence, spring transitions and click-outside handling — polished overlay interaction that elevates any website's UI.

gold.title: Animated Spring Popover
gold.reason: Spring-animated popover using framer-motion with cross button dismiss and smooth transitions — clean premium popover ideal for tooltips, feature highlights, and CTAs.

gold.title: Mission Success Dialog
gold.reason: Celebratory success state popover/dialog — high-impact conversion moment component useful for post-purchase, signup confirmation, and achievement flows.

silver.title: Popover 1
silver.reason: Functional popover component with clean styling — good quality and reusable but lacks the animation polish to reach Gold tier.

silver.title: Popover (React Aria)
silver.reason: Accessibility-first popover built with react-aria-components — excellent a11y foundation and clean implementation, strong choice for compliance-focused sites.

silver.title: Popover 1
silver.reason: Clean popover variant with solid design — functional and well-executed, good for tooltips and help text overlays.

silver.title: Smart Popover
silver.reason: Enhanced popover with intelligent positioning logic — practical upgrade over bare shadcn, useful for complex page layouts.

silver.title: Drawer
silver.reason: Vaul-based mobile drawer — essential mobile pattern with smooth gesture support; widely applicable but a base component without custom design flair.

silver.title: Popover
silver.reason: Clean styled popover — good implementation with nice visual treatment, solid Silver for general-purpose use.

bronze.title: Popover 1 (Base UI)
bronze.reason: Base UI library popover primitive — unstyled/minimally styled foundation component, not ready for customer-facing use without significant customization.

bronze.title: Base Popover
bronze.reason: Explicitly named 'base' popover — foundational primitive without distinguishing design or animations, meant as a starting point not a finished component.

bronze.title: Popover
bronze.reason: Bare shadcn Popover wrapper over Radix Popover — no added styling or animation, purely a primitive re-export with minimal design value.
